notes: Manufacturer-source spec for the GTEEX Revolution R-32 platform. The propagation demo bumps specs.acresPerDay (e.g. "1,200-1,600" -> "1,200-1,800") to exercise the import + pin pipeline downstream to Terraplex's _upstream/revolution/ pin and into dealer sites' hub: markers. The distributor (Terraplex) hub's own products/r-32.json holds dealer-facing display copy and is NOT overwritten by propagation.
